outcome_summary: Fifth routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 05 — 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_05.md. Findings: C1 1/27 defective = 3.7% (22 Sound, 4 Defensible, 1 Reversed — E-7 property_dualism->philosophical_zombie); C2 0/20 fail; C3 1/20 fail = 5.0% (N-8 ross_paradox, jargon-gated summary — first C3 fail of the census). The E-7 defect is notable in kind: it is the exact position->thought-experiment shape migration 0062 already flipped for the sibling pair property_dualism->knowledge_argument, so it reads as a fresh authoring defect the audit's own 0062 logic would catch; scored Reversed with the 0062 structural precedent as the analytic warrant (no SEP fetch needed). Three audit-touched edges this shard: E-11 + E-27 are post-0062-flip directions, both verify Sound on their corrected directions; E-20 (supervenience_mental->mental_causation) was 0064-annotated rather than flipped, and the audit's own attached evidence argues the target is conceptually prior — scored Defensible, flagged prominently for the closeout as the rare 'audit evidence in tension with the edge it annotates' case. Four Defensible verdicts vs shard 04's one — a cluster of supportable-but-not-canonical secondary prerequisites, flagged for the closeout's consistency review. Running C1 across shards 01-05: 10.7% / 3.6% / 3.6% / 0.0% / 3.7%, firmly under the production audit's 13% baseline. Candidate findings only; disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-05 marked complete; SQA-06 next. No in-band Issues. mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires because the boot search surfaced only meta-methodology drawers (the census-design architecture drawers from agent-a4f66e0874c34c21d.jsonl) rather than drawers bearing on shard 05's specific content — same benign shape prior census shards saw; the diary entry and evidence file operate fully within that methodology and reference S-0122/S-0165 prior context. 0 validator hard-fails (50 checks on --final-check).
